span.p:
api.py — FastAPI :8000
GET /health · GET /verdicts · GET /verdicts/{id}
POST /evaluate · POST /evaluate/batch
POST /drift · POST /evaluator-quality · GET /evaluator-quality/demo
require_secret · valid_run_id · httpx error → 503
